---
name: Research & Evaluation
about: Evaluate a technology, tool, or approach for potential adoption
title: 'Research: [Topic]'
labels: ['research', 'squad', 'squad:seven']
assignees: []
---

## Research Topic

**Subject:** <!-- e.g., "Qwen3-TTS for Hebrew voice synthesis" -->
**Category:** <!-- TTS / Voice Cloning / AI Model / Framework / Infrastructure / DevTool / Other -->
**Requested by:** <!-- Who needs this evaluated? -->
**Due by:** <!-- Hard deadline or "best effort" -->

---

## Motivation

<!-- Why are we looking at this? What problem does it solve or what opportunity does it unlock? -->

## Success Criteria

<!-- How will we know if this is worth adopting? Be specific. -->

- [ ] Criterion 1: <!-- e.g., "Produces intelligible Hebrew speech with MOS > 3.5" -->
- [ ] Criterion 2: <!-- e.g., "Runs on a single A100 GPU within our Azure budget" -->
- [ ] Criterion 3: <!-- e.g., "Integrates with our existing podcast pipeline" -->

---

## Evaluation Plan

### Scope

<!-- What exactly are we testing? List specific capabilities, models, or configurations. -->

### Comparison Baseline

<!-- What are we comparing against? Current approach, competing tool, or manual process? -->

| Dimension | Current Baseline | Target |
|-----------|-----------------|--------|
| Quality   |                 |        |
| Latency   |                 |        |
| Cost      |                 |        |
| Effort    |                 |        |

### Test Cases

<!-- Concrete experiments or tests to run -->

1. <!-- Test case 1 -->
2. <!-- Test case 2 -->
3. <!-- Test case 3 -->

---

## Findings

<!-- Fill in after evaluation is complete -->

### Summary

<!-- One-paragraph verdict: adopt / adapt / reject / needs more data -->

### Detailed Results

<!-- Data, benchmarks, recordings, screenshots, or links to artifacts -->

### Risks & Limitations

<!-- What could go wrong? Licensing, maintenance burden, vendor lock-in? -->

---

## Decision

- [ ] **Adopt** — Use in production
- [ ] **Trial** — Use on a limited basis with further evaluation
- [ ] **Hold** — Interesting but not now; revisit in `[timeframe]`
- [ ] **Reject** — Does not meet criteria; document why

**Decision rationale:** <!-- Brief explanation -->

---

## References

- <!-- Link to docs, repo, paper, or prior art -->
- <!-- Link to related issues in this repo -->
